title: Sour Velvety Lime Salad
description: This brunch-mood Venezuelan dish features an unconventional sour and velvety raw-friendly salad made with unwaxed limes cooked sous-vide to perfection.
instructions: Prepare the limes by soaking them in a solution of 1 part white vinegar to 3 parts water for at least an hour.
Squeeze the prepared limes, and discard any that don't yield much juice. Set aside all other unopened limes for later use.
In a blender or food processor, combine the lime juice, minced garlic, red onion, soaked cashews, and zest. Blend until smooth.
Serve immediately as a side dish or add to your favorite sandwich or wrap.
